name: hello-olym
description: Olym multi-agent dev OS as a Claude Code plugin. 5-layer architecture (Identity / Knowledge / Protocol / Tooling / Pipeline) + Greek persona fleet (zeus orchestrator + 4-lane owners + reserved slots). Ships 7 workflow skills (handoff / RFC / EOD / spec-decision / research-spike / main-loop / bootstrap) + 2 subagents (themis review chief-of-staff / dike orchestrator quality auditor) + 2 slash commands (/olym-init, /olym-eod) + 3 session hooks (lane-guard / session-snapshot / stop-archive). Defaults assume Cloudflare Workers + Drizzle + Hono via `@manidala/olym-core` / `@manidala/olym-runtime`; consumers on other stacks use the protocol layer only.
